title: calamophyllum teretifolium
intro: Calamophyllum teretifolium, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, is native to New Zealand and is also known as the 'pukapuka'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Calamophyllum teretifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
